caption: A person wearing a blue traditional martial arts outfit performs a routine with a long staff in a large banquet hall. The setting features high ceilings with recessed lighting, tan walls, and a large purple carpeted area where the performer is positioned. In the background, an audience sits at banquet tables with red tablecloths, observing the demonstration. The performer begins by standing with their back to the viewer, holding the staff horizontally. As the sequence progresses, they shift into a wide, low stance, rotating their body and swinging the staff in a sweeping motion. By the final frame, the performer has pivoted, thrusting the staff forward and to the side while maintaining a deep, balanced posture. The audience remains seated and attentive throughout the movement, and there is no visible on-screen text or logos.
